reviews.comment:
Atencion muy buena, reciben codigo QR. Lo malo es la hora en la q eligen descargar el combustible de los camiones.. filas de espera... salis de viaje mas tarde de lo esperado..

(Translated by Google)
The service was very good; they accept QR codes. The downside is the time they choose to unload the fuel from the trucks... long lines... you leave your trip later than expected.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyNnVpSHNRRRAB
